headline: Five systems, one platform
intro: The repository now acts as an AI control plane, content engine, deployment surface, and public website.

items.title: Command Router API
items.description: Validates structured actions and dispatches them to generators, media providers, file editors, and deploy agents.

items.title: Content Engine
items.description: Creates and edits JSON-driven pages, blog posts, feature blocks, pricing data, and product copy under /content.

items.title: Media Engine
items.description: Discovers free assets from Unsplash, Pexels, and Pixabay, then stores local copies in frontend/assets.

items.title: Deploy Agent
items.description: Stages workspace changes, commits them with AI-aware messages, pushes upstream, and records deployment status.
